title: Coinbase Q1 2026 Earnings Preview
text: Coinbase Q1 2026 earnings report date May 7, 2026 after market close. Analyst expectations for EPS $0.36 and revenue $1.51 billion representing significant decline from recent quarters. Q4 2025 showed weakness with negative $2.49 EPS versus $1.00 estimate, while revenue fell from $1.78 billion to projected $1.51 billion. Current stock price $197.75 with market cap $52.19 billion and P/E ratio 41.9x. Meyka AI Rating B+. Analyst consensus shows 25 buy ratings, 7 holds, and 5 sells, translating to overall buy recommendation. Key factors to monitor include trading volumes and user engagement, institutional adoption trends, regulatory developments, and balance sheet strength at $44.41 cash per share. Mixed beat-and-miss pattern makes prediction uncertain.
